title: ceanothus × regius
intro: Ceanothus × regius, also known as the royal California lilac, is a hybrid shrub plant that belongs to the family Rhamnaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ceanothus × regius include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. Ceanothus × regius can be prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions.
